name: Navjot Singh Chahal
title: MS Electrical Engineering @ UPenn | Robotics · Autonomous Systems · ML · Backend
tagline: Passionate Engineering graduate (June 2026) with 5+ years of professional experience in research & development of efficient and scalable autonomous systems.
bio: I am a Master of Science student in Electrical Engineering at the University of Pennsylvania (SEAS), graduating June 2026 with a GPA of 3.49/4.0. With 5+ years of industry experience, I work across robotics (Figueroa GRASP Lab — proprioception & low-level robot control), Mod Lab (modular robotic platforms), quantum hardware experiments (QHEL Lab — IBM quantum devices), embedded IoT systems, and scalable JVM backends. Previously a Software Engineer at UHG Optum (Fortune 5 CTO Acceleration Team, Scala/Akka) and HCL Technologies (Java Spring Boot & NLP automation).
